Video.summary: After a drunk reveller falls 20 metres off a cliff, lifeguards can’t believe the state he’s in.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 09

Video.summary: Lifeguards respond to a suspected heart attack. Two green whistles are used for a dislocated shoulder.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 03

Video.summary: A young boy suffers a spinal injury on his birthday. Lifeguards bring their kids to Bondi.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 07

Video.summary: Tommy rescues intoxicated tourists. Reidy pursues creeps on the beach. A Danish backpacker bares all on Bondi.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 10

Video.summary: Reidy attends a deja vu rescue. A boy is missing. Lifeguards deal with blue bottle invasions and mass rescues.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 07

Video.summary: When surfer Damo is treated for a spinal injury, lifeguards fear the worst.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 07

Video.summary: The biggest mass rescue in years sees Bondi Beach closed. Nicola joins the team and leads a mass rescue.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 02

Video.summary: A brawl takes place at the North end. Tommy and Harries attempt a number of rescues.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 08

Video.summary: A diabetic suffers an epileptic fit and Troy catches bag thieves operating on Bondi.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 05

Video.summary: Lifeguards perform CPR on a man initially complaining of chest pains who suddenly has a cardiac arrest.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 09

Video.summary: A suspected body is sighted in the water. Ryan bogs the buggy. Jethro dislocates his shoulder on the jet ski.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 09

Video.summary: Lfeguards treat an anaphylactic shock patient for the first time and perform a surprising Christmas rescue.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 03

Video.summary: A surfer suffers a serious fin chop and Will attempts to run for 48 hours with no sleep.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 03

Video.summary: After Jack rescues a drunk swimmer, the Bondi Rescue camera crew is attacked.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 04

Video.summary: Bluebottles swarm at Bondi, so Harries devises a magical treatment for the stings.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 08

Video.summary: It's the busiest day in a decade for Bondi lifeguards, with more than one hundred rescues.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 02

Video.summary: Big waves come to Bondi and Maxi hits trouble during a daring jetski rescue.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 06

Video.summary: Lifeguards assist a concussed boy who suffered a seizure, and a woman hit by a car. Karlie Kloss visits Bondi.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 05

Video.summary: Family members watch as lifeguards attempt to resuscitate two people from the same family.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 12

Video.summary: Jackson administers the EpiPen for anaphylactic shock and Chase and Max go fishing on jetskis.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 07

Video.summary: Tommy faces seaweed perils on the jetski. Chase and Will rush north on the jetski for a cliff fall.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 05

Video.summary: Chappo nabs a bag snatcher. Whippet and Reidy treat an unconscious woman. A skateboarder dislocates his ankle.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 10

Video.summary: Borders open, tourists flood Bondi. Chase explores a shark colony with a local diver.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 06

Video.summary: Spotlights illuminate World Pride Beach Party with 15,010 revelers. Hoppo marks 30 years on the beach.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 11

Video.summary: Lifeguards try conquer their fear of sharks and must recover the body of a young man found dead in the surf.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 09

Video.summary: Jack and Azza aid a perplexing surfer. Maxi enforces rules in rescues, facing unprecedented challenges later.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 02

Video.summary: Jesse rescues a vicious rat from the skate bowl and lifeguards deal with a punch-up in the surf break.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 07

Video.summary: Bisho performs a cliff-face rescue with limited gear. Trainee Taco redeems himself with a big surf rescue.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 08

Video.summary: New Years Eve brings drunk swimmers, buggy thieves and shark sightings prompting a beach evacuation of 40,010.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 03

Video.summary: Kite surfers visit a stormy Bondi. Chappo and Jack aid victim of chest pain, Harries confronts a body surfer.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 10

Video.summary: Chappo makes a sprint to rescue a swimmer and Bagus keeps a nude photo shoot secret from the lifeguards.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 03

Video.summary: After 2 years Bondi has reopened and the lifeguards manage 30,010 beachgoers.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 01

Video.summary: A woman walks naked on the beach. Lifeguards compete in the annual wave riding competition.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 13

Video.summary: Lifeguards deal with a missing boy and two friends - one dislocates his hip, the other has a seizure.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 07

Video.summary: A young local suffers a serious skating accident. Festive spirit turns deadly with alcohol affected swimmers.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 05

Video.summary: Yatesy attempts to rescue an inexperienced surfer. After shark sightings, the lifeguards test new technology.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 11

Video.summary: A man is dragged unconscious from the water, no pulse and not breathing. Reidy and Beardy begin resuscitation.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 06

Video.summary: As lifeguards try bring back a woman found lifeless between the flags, her mentally impaired son arrives.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 02

Video.summary: Nicola attempts to rescue a bodyboarder in his 70s. A tragic spinal injury leaves the lifeguards in shock.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 12

Video.summary: Jethro rescues a man more than double his size, then accidentally locks himself in the lifeguard tower.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 03

Video.summary: Cyclonic swell hits Bondi Beach with 12-foot waves. H lectures drunken youths. New drone technology is tested.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 10

Video.summary: A car falls onto a busy walking track and a pervert flees police. The Annual Lifeguard Race is on.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 05

Video.summary: Chase mans the tower alone, and Dylan deals with a spinal incident. Off the beach, Hoppo apprehends a thief.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 01

Video.summary: Monks go missing, a bluebottle sting turns serious and a young cancer patient becomes "lifeguard for the day".
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 07

Video.summary: A Bondi summer ends with the apprehension of perverts, bag thieves and an unexpected COVID lockdown.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 10

Video.summary: A lighting strike survival. A young spinal patient hits Singlets too close to home. Gavin bogs the buggy.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 08

Video.summary: Lifeguards investigate a floating object a kilometre offshore, Mario rescues a woman on an inflatable tomato.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 09

Video.summary: Christmas at Bondi overwhelms lifeguards. Jake and Jackson struggle with rescues, and Maxi makes a wrong move.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 03
